name: Reown
description: Onchain UX toolkit (formerly WalletConnect) with AppKit and WalletKit supporting 400+ wallets across EVM, Solana and Bitcoin.

seo.title: Reown — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Reown: Onchain UX toolkit (formerly WalletConnect) with AppKit and WalletKit supporting 400+ wallets across EVM, Solana and Bitcoin.

when_to_use: Multi-wallet connection UX with WalletConnect AppKit
SIWE (Sign-In with Ethereum) authentication for dApps
400+ wallet support for broad user onboarding coverage
Session management for persistent Web3 app authentication
Cross-chain wallet connection for EVM, Solana, and Bitcoin

pros: De facto standard for wallet connection across 400+ wallets
AppKit and WalletKit cover both app and wallet sides
cons: Brand churn from WalletConnect rename creates confusion
Not a full auth solution on its own
review.verdict: Unavoidable plumbing for external wallet connect; pair with an auth SDK for social and email login.
review.best_for: dApps supporting a broad range of external wallets
review.not_for: Apps that only need embedded wallet onboarding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
